content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions are met:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp
SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='J09C_temp'
CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

WITH haus_counts AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS) UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT eq_count FROM haus_counts WHERE haus_counts.HAUS = J09C_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN final_CITY1 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN final_CITY2 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN final_POST_CODE1 INTEGER
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT
UPDATE J09C_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg WHERE eablg.Installation = J09C_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = COALESCE((SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), FORENAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), SURNAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREET = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREETNO = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), final_CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), final_CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), final_POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), EMAIL = COALESCE((SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1))

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, final_POST_CODE1 AS POST_CODE1, final_CITY1 AS CITY1, final_CITY2 AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, final_POST_CODE1 AS POST_CODE1, final_CITY1 AS CITY1, final_CITY2 AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09C mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09C export excluding mandatory reading entries.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp

- Exported 5533 non-mandatory rows to `J09C.csv`

- Deleted temporary table `J09C_temp`
